steps.title: Match the pronoun
steps.content: The phrase rivers such as the Mississippi is plural, and the blank explains what those rivers do as they expand and contract. The pronoun must therefore be plural, and the verb must agree with it.

steps.title: Reject mismatches
steps.content: B uses singular one, and C uses singular it, so neither agrees with rivers. D uses we, which incorrectly makes the speaker part of the action. The remaining choice gives the needed plural pronoun and verb. The answer is A.
